title: SpeedBuildersHelper
description: A mod to help players track time in the gamemode Hypixel SpeedBuilders,  allowing for players to see and work to beat the times while keeping track accurately
body:
SpeedBuildersHelper Mod

A simple yet powerful tool to help you track and improve your times in SpeedBuilders! Whether you’re grinding personal bests or just want an easy way to see your progress, this mod has you covered.


```
Commands
Command Description
/sb or /speedbuilders Opens the SpeedBuilders settings menu
/speedbuilders debug: Toggles debug mode on/off
/speedbuilders toggle: Enables or disables SpeedBuildersHelper entirely
/speedbuilders setname: Sets your username for personalized tracking
/speedbuilders times: Displays your best times, sorted by speed
/speedbuilders showtime: Shows your best time for the current theme you’re playing
/speedbuilders overview: Lists all new personal bests achieved this session
/speedbuilders reset: Clears all best times for the current session
```
If you have questions, feedback, or ideas for improvements, you can reach out to me — boxeth on Discord or make an issue request on Github.



# Happy Building & Speedrunning!
